narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 428 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.7 percentage points.
